channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Weekly)

item.description:
👤 Owner: PerfectXM

📝 Repository: PerfectXM/mcp-db-server

📄 Descrizione: 🔥 让 AI 直接操刀你的数据库！无状态 MCP 数据库服务，支持 MySQL / PostgreSQL / SQLite / SQL Server / Oracle / H2，连接参数即传即用，零持久化零配置。

item.title: ☕ 0x0hook/Scalpel (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 0x0hook

📝 Repository: 0x0hook/Scalpel

📄 Descrizione: Scalpel is a Ghidra plugin for precise hex viewing, byte-level patching, and low-level binary inspection

item.title: ☕ smikme/meshapp (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: smikme

📝 Repository: smikme/meshapp

📄 Descrizione: MeshApp is a full-featured desktop client for managing devices and communicating in Meshtastic and MeshCore mesh networks. The application replaces mobile clients on a PC and provides advanced capabilities for monitoring, telemetry visualization, and radio module configuration.
